_meta.matrix: 25 — Dungeon-core spawns a minion (verb→tools wiring + introduce_npc)
_meta.notes: spawn_minion is the core's signature offensive verb. Its verbMappings declare introduce_npc + change_form_state — the narrator must call introduce_npc with a templateId from the bestiary (warped-minion is one valid choice) on success. Phase 9 follow-up; pairs with 23 (cursed-book hard-move) to triangulate the wedge.

input: I spawn a minion in the eastern corridor — a stub-legged thing of moss and damp stone
